prompt: Create a luxurious vertical promotional poster for GPT Images 2.0, in a premium cinematic 3D style. The scene features one iridescent mosaic chameleon perched on top of one large pearly seashell, both covered in tiny reflective mirror tiles and mother-of-pearl surfaces, sparkling with rose-gold and cool cyan highlights. Use a deep teal-to-navy gradient background filled with glittering particle dust, thin elegant orbital light trails, starburst lens flares, and a shimmering reflective floor with scattered sparkling bokeh. Place the typography prominently in the upper half: 4 visible text elements total, consisting of the oversized metallic serif headline “GPT Images”, the separate small version text “2.0” to the right, the left-side stacked tagline “Words are your vision.”, and the bottom-right brand mark reading “HailuoAI” beside a colorful rounded swirl icon. Use elegant high-contrast Didot/Bodoni-style serif lettering for the main title, pale silver chrome material, subtle beveling, and refined spacing. The composition should feel like a high-end technology launch ad: glossy, magical, fashion editorial lighting, ultra-detailed 3D render, reflective caustics, soft volumetric glow, sharp focus on the chameleon and shell, vertical 2:3 aspect ratio.
